title: Sprint Morning Training
description: Warm-up drills, acceleration runs 30m-60m, sprint intervals 8x100m at 90% effort.

title: Marathon Endurance Run
description: Long steady-state run at marathon pace. Heart rate zone 2-3. Hydration stations every 5km.

title: High Jump Technique Session
description: Fosbury flop technique refinement, approach run drills, bar clearance practice.

title: Regional Championship
description: Regional athletics championship. Sprint, jump events. Warm-up area available from 08:00.

title: Javelin Strength & Throw
description: Upper body activation, run-up mechanics, delivery practice with varying weights.

title: Recovery & Mobility Session
description: Foam rolling, dynamic stretching, yoga flow. Active recovery post competition week.
